commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a manual redirect-following fetch wrapper for streamable MCP HTTP transports and a unit test asserting custom headers are scrubbed on cross-origin redirects.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence real reproduction was provided. Source inspection shows the current-main path delegates streamable MCP redirects to the SDK/default fetch path, but the PR body says no after-fix command or real MCP redirect setup was run.
